title: Two Sum
notes: Given an array of integers nums and an integer target, return indices of the two numbers such that they add up to target.

title: Valid Parentheses
notes: Use a stack to match opening and closing brackets.

title: Merge Two Sorted Lists
notes: Standard two-pointer traversal merging elements into a dummy head list.

title: Best Time to Buy and Sell Stock
notes: Keep track of min price seen and calculate max profit dynamically.

title: Valid Palindrome
notes: Clean string of non-alphanumeric chars and check matching using two pointers.

title: Invert Binary Tree
notes: Recursive swap of left and right child subtrees.

title: Merge Intervals
notes: Sort intervals by start time. Merge overlapping intervals in a single pass.
